name: studio.get_page_analytics
description: Fetch per-page analytics: pageviews, unique visitors, time on page, referrers, for a specific page over a time window.
whenToUse: Drill-down after studio.get_analytics_overview flagged a specific top page to investigate.
Answer 'is this landing page working' with visitor count + avg time + bounce rate.
Attribution: inspect referrers for a specific campaign landing page to verify traffic sources.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants a site-wide rollup — use studio.get_analytics_overview; per-page fan-out is slower and higher-cost.
Caller does not yet know the page_id — resolve via studio.list_pages first.
Caller wants SEO rank for the page's target keyword — use studio.list_keywords; analytics is behavioral, not rank data.
